_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Technical Data Assessment
summary: This DID provides an automated data base for assessing specified technology research areas and contains format and content instructions for the data product generated by contract requirements.
description_purpose: Technical Data Assessment provides an automated data base on the assessment of a specified area of technology research. The data is used to acquire an assessment of an area of technology research.
application_interrelationship: This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format and content preparation instructions for the data product generated by the specific and discrete task requirement as delineated in the contract.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

children.title: Format.
children.content: The Technical Data Assessment base shall be entered on magnetic tape in the following format:

children.title: Content.
children.content: The following data elements are applicable:

children.title: Technical area as specified by contract, limit to 50 character and left justified.
Technology as specified by contract, limit to 50 characters and left justified.
Application related system and limit to 50 characters, left justified.
Text.
children.content: Assessment of the technology as follows:

children.title: Producibility.
children.content: Begin this field with "PRODUCABI" followed by the data and limit to 200 characters.

children.title: Parametric description.
children.content: Begin this field with "PARBOUNDS" followed by the data and limit to 200 characters.

children.title: Limits on performance.
children.content: Begin this field with "PERLIMITS" followed by the data and limit to 200 characters.

children.title: Reference.
children.content: Identify the basis of the assessment as follows:

children.title: Author.
children.content: Begin with "AUTHOR" followed by the data and limit to 120 characters.

children.title: Publisher.
children.content: Begin with "PUBLISHER" followed by the data and limit to 100 characters.

children.title: Title.
children.content: Begin with "TITLE" followed by the data and limit to 150 characters.

children.title: Abstract.
children.content: Begin with "ABSTRACT" followed by the data and limit to 500 characters.

children.title: Keywords in text.
children.content: Begin with "KEYWORD" followed by the first keyword, a comma, the second keyword, etc., and limit to 500 characters.
